sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n28249" key="dragmathfo/ros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δραγμᾰτ-ηφόρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n28249.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">carrying sheaves,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0614.tlg001:88:16" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Babr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">88.16</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
